title: [CI:DOCS] Update Website Link for Install Instructions
body:
This pull request makes minor changes to `install.md`:
* More direct link to website install instructions to assist users finding install instructions through GitHub
* Minor language edits

comments.body:
your git commit message should change to like this:
```
update website link for install instructions

Signed-off-by: danielhelfand <danielhelfand@xxx.com>
```
otherwise LGTM

> your git commit message should change to like this:
> 
> ```
> update website link for install instructions
> 
> Signed-off-by: danielhelfand <danielhelfand@xxx.com>
> ```

Amended with signoff. Thanks.
